title: FIDO PET FOOD BANK - 211info
text: FIDO PET FOOD BANK FIDO PET FOOD BANK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pet food for cats and dogs. Donations of pet food and supplies are accepted on-site and at various community locations. 14186 Fir Street Suite 203 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Low-income pet owners or individuals in urgent or emergency situations. Hours: 2nd and 4th Wednesday of the month 9am-noon, by appointment only, 3rd Saturday of the month 9am-1:30pm If food is urgently needed outside of service hours, please call to coordinate sooner pick-up if available. Email (503) 655-3663 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 655-3663 Main phone Main phone (503) 655-3663 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. First time recipients will need to complete an application online or onsite. FEES: Donation requested DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Past Clackamas County Public Services Building on Kaen Road. Turn left at parking lot F. Beside U-Haul. Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Pet Food Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - ANIMEALS DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - PET NEEDS PANTRY DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - VETERANS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FIDO PET FOOD BANK
